title: Living in Boulder vlog 1 -  8  - 2017: Google Earthing Colosseum including ropes

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on January 9, 2017, describing his day working on a Google Earth 3D recreation of the Roman Colosseum. He discusses the challenges of modeling the velarium (awning) rope system, calculating how many rope anchor circles to draw around the perimeter, and his plans to add interior colonnades and stone fascia details to make the model visually impressive.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it complex and worth the effort — adding 2500+ rope circles will make the model look really cool
Rome's grid of angular blocks and lines makes it unusually easy to recreate accurately in 3D

stances.topic: Finishing the model in one day
stances.position: Decided against rushing it — better to approach it fresh and do it right
